arg_no_NA() arg_is_NA() arg_all_NA()

arg_non_null() arg_null()
Check NULL Argument
arg_numeric() arg_number() arg_whole_numeric() arg_whole_number() arg_counts() arg_count()

arg_or() arg_and()
Check That Arguments Meet Some or All Criteria
